title: Add stub code detection and rejection in workplan executor

tasks.title: Add validate_generated_code() function to hex-agent/src/workplan_executor.rs that checks for stub patterns: '// ... existing code ...', '// TODO', '// FIXME', 'placeholder', lines < 10 in a .rs file, and rejects if found
Call validate_generated_code() before writing files in workplan executor, fail task with clear error if validation fails
